message.content:
### Person 1: Taroon  
- **Full Name**: Taroon  
- **Role/Title**: CEO & Chief Product Architect  
- **Sub-Role**: Super Admin  
- **Number of Projects**: Not explicitly stated (no numerical value provided)  
- **Bio/Description**:  
  - Company vision, strategy, product roadmap  
  - System architecture of Trishulhub dashboard  
  - Final authority on tools, tech stack, platforms  
  - Major client relationships & partnerships  
  - Override vote on all operational matters  
- **Other Details**:  
  - Icon: Trophy/award icon (left of name)  
  - Color: Orange header bar  


### Person 2: Akshat  
- **Full Name**: Akshat  
- **Role/Title**: Head of IT & Development  
- **Sub-Role**: Co-Founder  
- **Number of Projects**: Not explicitly stated (no numerical value provided)  
- **Bio/Description**:  
  - Execution of all dev work (Trishulhub + client)

  - Code quality, deployment, technical delivery  
  - Translate architecture into working features  
- **Other Details**:  
  - Icon: Code brackets icon (left of name)  
  - Color: Blue header bar  


### Person 3: Pruthviraj  
- **Full Name**: Pruthviraj  
- **Role/Title**: COO & Head of Finance/Admin

- **Other Details**:
